channel.title: Cory Todd
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: GPG Keys
item.description: How to get the GPG key for cory@ardonyx.io using wkd. gpg --auto-key-locate wkd --locate-keys cory@ardonyx.io pub rsa2048 2019-11-10 [SC] [expires: 2021-11-10] 8FF6320A6D70AEC784BB48BDED5A456212B63FC4 uid [ultimate] Cory Todd <cory@ardonyx.io> sub rsa2048 2019-11-10 [E] [expires: 2021-11-10] -----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK----- item.title: Day 0
item.description: Starting Fresh After years of neglect, it is time to revive this website. Instead of making promises about the future, let’s jump right in with some Raspberry Pi! I’ve been using Pi since the version 1 days and still can’t believe how capable the hardware is. With such an awesome community of developers and makers, just about anything you think of can be done with a Pi. I have the official 7” touchscreen integrated into a Cana case which I find extremely convenient.

item.title: About
item.description: Cory has been writing software for Windows, Linux, and embedded devices for more than 10 years. From the early days of programming text-based RPGs and his TI-83+ calculator, he has had a strong passion for solving interesting problems. He enjoys helping teams and systems work together by improving automation and identifying bottlenecks. Since completing his MS in computer science from Georgia Tech in 2018 he has found a renewed purpose in pursuing new knowledge.

item.title: Resume
item.description: 10 years of successful software development and innovation. I have extensive experience in the complete development cycle of both hardware and software products. Team collaboration and mentorship are hallmarks of my work. Experience Pyramid Technologies, Mesa, AZ — Senior Software Engineer | July 2017 - Present Lead developer on counterfeit currency detection algorithms Extensive custom USB development Design and develop asynchronous task-based architecture on RTOS Mentor coworkers with code-review and training Grow suite of automation tools for CI and build tools Pyramid Technologies, Mesa, AZ — Software Engineer | November 2012 - July 2017
